title: LEFT JOIN bug with CONST value
poc: select * from a left join (select a, 20 from b) as x using (a);
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with constant value in subquery
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (a integer NOT NULL, b varchar(50));
CREATE TABLE b (a integer, c float DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT * FROM a LEFT JOIN (SELECT a, 20 AS constant_value FROM b) AS x USING (a);
